title: Dark Fantasy: Church of Sin — Vanilla
description: The mod adds an abandoned Orthodox church with a creepy backstory, enemies, loot, and new dark paintings.
body:
# Description
Church of Sin is an atmospheric mod that plunges players into a world of forgotten horror. During your adventures, you will occasionally stumble upon a large Orthodox church, abandoned after a mysterious and bloody event. Its majestic domes, an iconostasis made of weathered blocks, and an altar covered in cobwebs and bones create an overwhelming sense of impending nightmare.

Inside the church lies a short but soul-chilling story. To uncover the secrets of this place and claim the treasures hidden within, you will have to face a serious challenge from the forces guarding the gloomy corridors.

Perfect for horror-RPG gameplay!

The new structure spawns rarely in birch forests.

In addition, the mod adds several new dark painting variants that fit perfectly into the Orthodox style but with a strong horror twist.

The mod requires no additional mods.
